intro: Morisonia tuxtlensis, also known as the "Tuxtlas Morning Glory," is a species of flowering plant in the family Convolvulaceae. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including inflammation, fever, and respiratory issues, due to its potential health benefits in reducing oxidative stress and modulating the immune system. Its bioactive constituents include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
